text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, at the training track...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew, time for a littlebreak.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek is known for her<n>stamina, so I'm
surprised she's out<n>of breath from running laps.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the concern, but I'm just<n>running a
bit hot thanks to this<n>beautiful weather.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm glad you're worrying about me<n>though! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh gosh, thank you! Hehe! I'm all<n>energized
now!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Please make sure you cheer your<n>racer on just
as enthusiastically,<n>okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Goodness me, thank you! You're so<n>considerate.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, I know! Have some of these in<n>return! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Super Creek gives me some<n>handmade cookies.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
They're my special carrot cookies.<n>Go ahead
and have them during your<n>break.
